item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:money","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering says only that many people want these things and does not encode community-wide conventional acceptance or a reciprocal exchange purpose; add those criterial clauses and revise the lossy flag to acknowledge the actual omissions."}
